  • Constructor Details

    • Controller

      public Controller()

  • Method Details

    • addPerson

      public boolean addPerson(Person p)
      Adds a new Person to the directory Before adding it ensures no duplicate ID exists before adding.
      Parameters:
      p - Person object which is to be added
      Returns:
      true if successfully added, false if the ID already exists

    • deletePerson

      public boolean deletePerson(String id)
      Deletes a new Person from the directory using their ID This method first searches for thr personin the directory. If present, the object is deleted from the ArrayList
      Parameters:
      id - unique indentification of the person to be deleted
      Returns:
      true if person successfully found and deleted, false otherwise

    • findPerson

      public Person findPerson(String term)
      Searches for a person by ID or name (cases are ignored or case-insensitive)
      Parameters:
      term - ID or name to search
      Returns:
      The matching Person object if found, otherwise null

    • updateName

      public void updateName(String id, String newName)
      Updates the name of the Person
      Parameters:
      id - ID to search for the Person
      newName - the name to be updated with

    • updateId

      public void updateId(String oldId, String newId)
      Updates the ID of the Person
      Parameters:
      oldId - the current ID of the Person
      newId - the new ID to be updated with

    • updateMajor

      public void updateMajor(String id, String newMajor)
      Updates the major of a Student
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the student to be updated
      newMajor - the new major to be updated with

    • updateGpa

      public void updateGpa(String id, double gpa)
      Updates the GPA of a Student
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the student to be updated
      gpa - the new GPA to be updated with

    • updateDepartment

      public void updateDepartment(String id, String department)
      Updates the department of a Faculty
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the faculty to be updated
      department - the new department to be updated with

    • updateSalary

      public void updateSalary(String id, double newSalary)
      Updates the salary of a Faculty
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the faculty to be updated
      newSalary - the new salary to be updated with

    • listAllDetails

      public String listAllDetails()
      Lists all the details of the records in a formatted manner
      Returns:
      A string containing the formatted details of all records

    • saveFile

      public void saveFile()

      public void loadData()
